title: 0-1 Knapsack Maximum Value
hints: Consider the decision for each item: include it or leave it out. How does this choice affect the remaining capacity?
This problem exhibits optimal substructure and overlapping subproblems. Try using dynamic programming with a table indexed by item index and current capacity.
Define dp[i][w] as the max value using the first i items with capacity w. The recurrence compares skipping item i versus including it if it fits.
